source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Crisp English product UI with dense editorial hierarchy, readable numbers, and paired Japanese UI guidance.
layout: Dense content grids, thorn-cane separators, drupelet dot texture, 8px radii, structured navigation, and restrained blackberry depth.

prompts.label: Transparent blackberry bramble motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Blackberry transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a blackberry bramble motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A natural hedgerow blackberry cane with clustered ripe black-purple berries, individual glossy drupelets, magenta highlights, pale bloom on fruit, serrated leaf-green leaves, thorned brown canes, and a few unripe green berry nodes. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, rich fruit texture, no raspberries and no grapes.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include berries, leaves, thorned cane, and branching structure without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no raspberry hollow berries, no grape cluster, no wine imagery, no bowl, no hand, no props, no landscape, no text, no watermark, no loose fruit pile, no second plant species.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Blackberry light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Blackberry", derived from the visible blackberry bramble cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible deep content UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Blackberry, Blackberry Bramble, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from black-purple glossy berries, magenta drupelet highlights, pale fruit bloom, leaf-green serrated leaves, thorn-brown canes, hedgerow shadow, and soft pith surfaces. The board must read as blackberry, not raspberry or grape.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, pale bloom backgrounds, black-purple primary actions, magenta active chips, leaf-green success states, thorn-cane dividers, hedgerow ink text, subtle glossy drupelet dot texture.
Constraints: no raspberries, no grapes, no wine imagery, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Blackberry", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Blackberry dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Blackberry". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the blackberry bramble cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Blackberry, Blackberry Bramble, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve blackberry system language: black-purple fruit surfaces, hedgerow ink backgrounds, magenta drupelet highlights, leaf-green controls, thorn-brown borders, pale bloom text, thorn-cane dividers, glossy drupelet texture, 8px radius, precise shadcn/tweakcn component grid. Must read as blackberry, not raspberry or grape.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep hedgerow and ripe black surfaces, pale bloom foreground, blackberry purple active states, magenta chart highlights, leaf green focus/control accents, thorn brown borders, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no raspberries, no grapes, no wine imagery, no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Blackberry".
